introduction: A bartender, a serial killer who skins his face and wears it like a mask after killing a guest. One day, he runs into a suspicious man drinking alone at a bar. After killing him and wearing his face like a mask, the bartender soon becomes engulfed in a nightmare fantasy. In the fantasy, he encounters himself, who is much more cruel and bizarre than usual, and finds out that the man is a much crazier man than he is. His face clings to his skin of a bartender, and his madness is at its peak. To enjoy this film, you must abandon logic and probability in order to enjoy this work. This unfamiliar and bizarre story from start to finish slowly penetrates the viewer's mind as if a man's skin were sticking to a bartender's face. The crazy charm of this work, which unhinged charm impossible to define of joyfully unraveling with a free soul while rejecting a hard frame,  the natural acting of singer and actor Kaneko Nobuaki and Aina The End, and special appearances of Saito Takumi, cannot be defined in one word. you can only surrender and let yourself sink.
